case_title: AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. PAUL SANUT ET AL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-24-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JUL-17-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT SANUT, PAUL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-13-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-10-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-22-2019

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $296.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100064323) AS TO DEFENDANT SANUT, PAUL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMICA MUTUAL INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANUT, PAUL $9,738.02 PRINCIPAL, $296.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,034.52, SEE SCANNED DOC
